data.title: Hypothesis Driven Exploration for Deep Reinforcement Learning
data.excerpt: This paper was published in 2019. This work proposes the Hypothesis Proposal and Evaluation (HyPE) algorithm, which automatically explores based on hypotheses generated via a small set of intuitive assumptions about the behavior of objects in the physical world.

data.title: RL: Open problems
data.excerpt: There is a list of open questions related to exploration in reinforcement learning.

data.title: Inside theme+MathJax
data.excerpt: Using MathJax plugin to deal with a problem that original Inside theme can’t render the mathmatical formula written by latex code normally.

data.title: ImportError overview
data.excerpt: This article aim to deal with some errors, which occurs in the process of you import some package of tensorflow.

data.excerpt: Including Alibaba, Tsinghua, and Ubuntu’s default software sources.
